            -- Use the bijectivity to construct an isomorphism

            have h₁₁ : LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (PseudoHom.isomorphism h₃ : M →ₗ[A] N) = (LinearMap.toFun (h₇)) := by
              -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
              rfl
            -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
            have h₁₂ : (LinearMap.toFun (h₇)) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (Local : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N →ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N) := by
              -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
              exact h₉
            -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
            have h₁₃ : LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (PseudoHom.isomorphism h₃ : M →ₗ[A] N) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (Local : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N →ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N) := by
              -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
              exact h₉
            -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
            have h₁₄ : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N := by
              -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
              have h₁₅ : LocalizedModule.map p.1.primeCompl (PseudoHom.isomorphism h₃ : M →ₗ[A] N) = (LinearMap.toFun (h₇)) := by
                -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
                rfl
              -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
              have h₁₆ : (LinearMap.toFun (h₇)) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (Local : LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N →ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N) := by
                -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
                exact h₉
              -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
              exact h₁₆
            -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
            exact h₁₄
          -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
          exact h₁₀
        -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
        exact h₆
      -- Use the property of localizations to get an isomorphism
      exact ⟨h₄⟩
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : (∀ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 → Nonempty ((LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N))) → M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N := by
    intro h
    -- Use the fact that the localizations of M and N are isomorphic if M and N are pseudo-isomorphic
    have h₃ : M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N := by
      -- Use the property of pseudo-isomorphisms to get an isomorphism of localizations
      have h₄ : ∀ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 → Nonempty ((LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N)) := h
      -- Use the property of pseudo-isomorphisms to get an isomorphism of localizations
      have h₅ : M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N := by
        -- Use the property of pseudo-isomorphisms to get an isomorphism of localizations
        exact by
          classical
            -- Use the property of pseudo-isomorphisms to get an isomorphism of localizations
            exact
              PseudoHom.isomorphism (LinearMap.refl M)
      -- Use the property of pseudo-isomorphisms to get an isomorphism of localizations
      exact h₅
    -- Use the property of pseudo-isomorphisms to get an isomorphism of localizations
    exact h₃
  -- Combine the two directions to get the final result
  exact ⟨h₁, h₂⟩

have h₀ : M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] N ↔ ∀ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 →
      Nonempty ((LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl]
        (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N)) := by
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro h
      intro p hp
      have h₁ : Module.IsPseudoIsomorphic A M N := h
      have h₂ : ∀ (p : PrimeSpectrum A), p.1.primeHeight = 1 → Nonempty ((LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N)) := by
        intro p hp
        have h₃ : IsPseudoIsomorphism ((0 : LinearMap A M N)) := by
          exact h₁.toLinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism
        have h₄ : Nonempty ((LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N)) := by
          exact ⟨⟨0, 0⟩⟩
        exact h₄
      exact h₂ p hp
    · intro h
      have h₁ : ∀ (p : PrimeSpectrum A), p.1.primeHeight = 1 → Nonempty ((LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl M) ≃ₗ[Localization p.1.primeCompl] (LocalizedModule p.1.primeCompl N)) := h
      have h₂ : Module.IsPseudoIsomorphic A M N := by
        classical
        refine' ⟨M, _, hMT, N, _, hNT, _⟩
        refine' ⟨LinearMap.id _⟩
      exact h₂
  exact h₀

so `M [T⁻¹] ≅ (M [S⁻¹]) [T⁻¹/S⁻¹]`. 

But if `M [S⁻¹] ≅ N [S⁻¹]`, then `M [T⁻¹] ≅ N [T
